---
title: "Marshall Electrochemical Engineering Lab"
subtitle: "University of Canterbury · Chemical and Process Engineering"
toc: false
---

We develop electrochemical technologies for sustainable energy and materials processing, including green steel, hydrogen production, and electrochemical reactor design.

## Our Work

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### 🔬 Research
Current projects in electrochemical engineering and sustainable processing.

[View research →](https://marshall-echem-lab.github.io/research/)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 📚 Teaching
Course materials for ENCH291 and electrochemical engineering.

[View teaching →](https://marshall-echem-lab.github.io/teaching/)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 👥 Group
Meet the people in the lab.

[Meet the group →](https://marshall-echem-lab.github.io/research/members.html)
:::

:::
